overview: A luxury 3D-animated portfolio website for Makeup by Nehad Imran, a premium makeup artist studio in Bengaluru. Features a stunning dark/pinkish theme with Three.js 3D hero animations, gallery of 11 bridal makeup photos, services, testimonials, FAQ, contact with map, and floating WhatsApp/Instagram buttons.
features: 3D animated hero with floating particles and geometric shapes
Hero premium photo with pinkish glow frame
Gallery of 11 bridal makeup photos with lightbox
Why Choose Us with celebrity credential callout
Indian customer testimonials with star ratings
Dark/pinkish theme with blurry glow effects throughout
